version_update0.mysql:
ALTER TABLE `#__projecten_user` ADD `projectindex` INT(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `asset_id`;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `#__projecten_dpiproject` (
	`id` INT(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
	`asset_id` INT(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'FK to the #__assets table.',
	`actief` INT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`beeldkwaliteit` INT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`beheerplanning` INT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`deelopdrachten` INT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`ibor` INT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`projectnummer` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
	`projecttitel` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
	`slaeco` INT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`taken` INT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`params` text NOT NULL,
	`published` TINYINT(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
	`created_by` INT(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`modified_by` INT(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`created` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00',
	`modified` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00',
	`checked_out` int(11) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`checked_out_time` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00',
	`version` INT(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
	`hits` INT(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`access` INT(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`ordering` INT(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	PRIMARY KEY  (`id`),
	KEY `idx_projectnummer` (`projectnummer`),
	KEY `idx_access` (`access`),
	KEY `idx_checkout` (`checked_out`),
	KEY `idx_createdby` (`created_by`),
	KEY `idx_modifiedby` (`modified_by`),
	KEY `idx_state` (`published`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=0 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 DEFAULT COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC;

RENAME TABLE `#__projecten_project` to `#__projecten_lycensproject`;

ALTER TABLE `#__projecten_kaart` CHANGE `kalayerindex` `layerindexone` INT(7) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;

ALTER TABLE `#__projecten_kaart` CHANGE `melayerindex` `layerindexthree` INT(7) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;

ALTER TABLE `#__projecten_kaart` CHANGE `memeldingindex` `layerindextwo` INT(7) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;

ALTER TABLE `#__projecten_bpwaproject` ADD `deelopdrachten` INT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `berkelproject`;

version_update1.mysql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `#__projecten_kaart` (
	`id` INT(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
	`asset_id` INT(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'FK to the #__assets table.',
	`bklayerindex` INT(7) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`bkmeldingindex` INT(7) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`bplayerindex_one` INT(7) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`bplayerindex_two` INT(7) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`bpmeldingindex_one` INT(7) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`bpmeldingindex_two` INT(7) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`ibidtype` INT(7) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`iblayerindex` INT(7) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`mapid` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
	`oppervlakte` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
	`projectindex` INT(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`selayerindex` INT(7) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`setoevoegindex` INT(7) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`talayerindex` INT(7) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`type` INT(7) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`params` text NOT NULL,
	`published` TINYINT(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
	`created_by` INT(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`modified_by` INT(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`created` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00',
	`modified` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00',
	`checked_out` int(11) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`checked_out_time` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00',
	`version` INT(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
	`hits` INT(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`access` INT(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`ordering` INT(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	PRIMARY KEY  (`id`),
	KEY `idx_mapid` (`mapid`),
	KEY `idx_access` (`access`),
	KEY `idx_checkout` (`checked_out`),
	KEY `idx_createdby` (`created_by`),
	KEY `idx_modifiedby` (`modified_by`),
	KEY `idx_state` (`published`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=0 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 DEFAULT COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC;

ALTER TABLE `#__projecten_bpwaproject` CHANGE `meldingen` `bea` INT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;

ALTER TABLE `#__projecten_kaart` ADD `oppervlakte` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `mapid`;

version_update3.mysql:
ALTER TABLE `#__projecten_dpiproject` ADD `vta` INT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `taken`;

ALTER TABLE `#__projecten_kaart` ADD `server` INT(7) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `projectindex`;

version_update4.mysql:
ALTER TABLE `#__projecten_kaart` ADD `vtlayerindex` INT(7) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `type`;

ALTER TABLE `#__projecten_bpwaproject` ADD `hooby` INT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `ecologie`;

version_update8.mysql: ALTER TABLE `#__projecten_kaart` ADD `locatie` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `kalayerindex`;

version_update9.mysql: ALTER TABLE `#__projecten_kaart` CHANGE `locatie` `bplocatie` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '';

version_update10.mysql: ALTER TABLE `#__projecten_kaart` CHANGE `bplocatie` `bklocatie` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '';

version_update12.mysql: ALTER TABLE `#__projecten_email` ADD `discipline` INT(7) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `asset_id`;

version_update13.mysql: ALTER TABLE `#__projecten_bpwaproject` ADD `vtabvc` INT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `vta`;
